summary: Plan-only inventory review. The five open PRs are independent remediation candidates, not one canonical/duplicate family. No merge_candidate is emitted because the artifact does not contain complete merge preflight proof, including Codex /review results and hydrated comment/review-bot resolution. Two PRs need maintainer judgment before automation should proceed; two are kept as independent non-mutating candidates for later complete preflight; #82665 is routed to central security handling because the deterministic validator classified it as security-sensitive.
